issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or troubleshooting scenarios for installation or configuration failures.
Instructions assume a Linux environment and do not provide guidance for Windows or other operating systems.

scenarios.name: multi-protocol-auth-traffic-limit
scenarios.rationale: Response B contains some relevant details but is incomplete, while Response A is empty.

scenarios.name: proxy-chaining-rotation
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A is not provided and thus cannot meet the criteria.

scenarios.name: port-forwarding-ssh
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits internal and auth directives, while Response B fails to use the required tcppm directive and lacks logging.
